examples: The nurse took the thermometer, shook it, and put it under my armpit.
The untattooed area is left only under the left armpit, half of the right leg, and most of the face.
Occasionally, the "herald patch" may occur in a hidden position (armpit, for example) and not be noticed immediately.
Sasha hugged her purse to her shoulder, the warm ball of wallet snuggled in her armpit.
That still leaves a 10% chance of developing cancer in the chest wall, armpit or even in the abdomen.
